examples: We could see the lights of the ship winking in the distance.
Waiting for the Star Ferry, I see the winking lights of tug boats as they fuss around a cruise ship.
Anyone can do it; it's as easy as winking.
He made a few winking references to his rockstar past, he kept his comments grounded in facts.
But while the winking conservative lost the vice presidential race, she managed to score something else: the public's interest.
